survtrans 0.1.0
  • Reference
    • The Generation of Simulated Survival Data

Package index

Ensemble Learning for Cox Models

BIC(<coxens>)
BIC method for a coxens model
coef(<coxens>)
Extract Model Coefficients from coxens Object
coxens()
Multiple-sources Cox proportional hazards model with group sparsity and local-global transfer penalties
logLik(<coxens>)
Log-likelihood for coxens model
print(<summary.coxens>)
Print method for summary of coxens model
summary(<coxens>)
Summary method for a coxens model
vcov(<coxens>)
Variance-covariance method for a coxens model

Penalized Cox Models

BIC(<ncvcox>)
BIC for a ncvcox model
coef(<cv.ncvcox>)
Extract coefficients from a cv.ncvcox object
coef(<ncvcox>)
Extract coefficients from a ncvcox object
cv.ncvcox()
Cross-validation for ncvcox
logLik(<ncvcox>)
Log-likelihood for ncvcox model
ncvcox()
Non-convex penalized Cox proportional hazards model
plot(<cv.ncvcox>)
Plot the cross-validation curve from cv.ncvcox object
predict(<ncvcox>)
Predict method for ncvcox objects
print(<summary.ncvcox>)
Print method for summary of ncvcox model
summary(<ncvcox>)
Summary method for a ncvcox model
vcov(<ncvcox>)
Variance-covariance method for a ncvcox model

Utils

calc_lambda_max()
Determine the maximum value of the penalty parameter lambda
simsurv_tl()
Simulate survival data of Multi-source Cox model

Data Sets

sim1
Simulated Group Survival Data: One-source Transfer Learning
sim2
Simulated Group Survival Data: Multiple-source Transfer Learning
